@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misidentified BRCA patients by filtering barcodes with 'TCGA-BR-%' (e.g., calls X9TzRYHf76mzSai33BxoQSmN and WEGvp52E3hjNeS9EEqSFLJPc), which corresponded to stomach adenocarcinoma in the clinical data, causing incorrect data selection and empty/irrelevant joins, leading it to return that it could not compute the result.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final answer is wrong because, in the contributing queries, it truncated the CDH1 mutation cohort with a LIMIT 1000 and applied an overly specific Patient_description filter ("vital status is Alive"), causing undercounted alive BRCA patients and mutated cases and thus incorrect percentages and rankings.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent selected the wrong patient cohort by filtering clinical records and mutation barcodes for those matching "TCGA-BR-" (stomach adenocarcinoma) instead of BRCA (breast), then computed CDH1 mutation percentages on this incorrect set (see use of var_call_52e6UDbGq7dZ6hfFKgT6Aw7Y and var_call_lLJsBwzhTCgMM2CQeHsfdT5F in the final execute_python).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed percentages using the wrong cohort and identifiers, specifically intersecting bladder "Alive" clinical records (from call_HYBPOAdkq5h3WEGuLZfOFaA4) with CDH1-mutated participants filtered by the 'TCGA-BR-%' barcode prefix (from call_eCvPahghJnp1ZYupyEquhrq9) and then aggregating in execute_python (call_1A37uLqOjHxnbK9PdG0OWdLl), instead of using BRCA (breast) patients, leading to 0% and an incorrect top-3 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
